options.name: --force
options.description:
Forces install even if directory already exists and is 
not empty

options.name: --id
options.description: Serial or Device to filter for

options.name: --id
options.description: Serial or Device to filter for

options.name: --id
options.description: Serial or Device to filter for

options.name: --keep-data
options.description: Keep the data and cache directories

options.name: --abi
options.description:
The ABI to use for the AVD (Auto-selects if there is only
one ABI)

options.name: --device
options.description:
Device Id or NumericId (Possible options from: `avd 
devices`)

options.name: --force
options.description: Force the creation of the AVD

options.name: --sdcard-size
options.description: Size of SDCard to create in MB

options.name: --skin
options.description: The name of a skin to use with this device.

options.name: --target
options.description:
Target Id or NumericId (Possible options from: `avd 
targets`)

options.name: --accel
options.description:
Acceleration mode (Possible values: auto, off, 
on)

options.name: --cache-size
options.description:
The cache partition size in MB (Default is 66 
MB)

options.name: --camera-back
options.description:
Emulation mode for a camera facing backwards (Possible 
values: emulated, webcam#, none)

options.name: --camera-front
options.description:
Emulation mode for a camera facing forward (Possible 
values: emulated, webcam#, none)

options.name: --engine
options.description:
Emulator engine (Possible values: auto, classic, 
qemu2)

options.name: --memory
options.description:
The physical RAM size in MB (Possible values: ranges from
1536 to 8192)

options.name: --no-boot-anim
options.description:
Disable boot animation during emulator startup for faster
booting

options.name: --no-jni
options.description:
Disable extended Java Native Interface (JNI) 
checks

options.name: --partition-size
options.description: The system/data partition size in MB

options.name: --port
options.description:
The TCP port number for the console and adb (Possible 
values: ranges from 5554 to 5682)

options.name: --screen
options.description:
Emulated touch screen mode (Possible values: touch, 
multi-touch, no-touch)

options.name: --timeout
options.description:
Timeout in seconds if waiting for emulator to 
boot

options.name: --wait-exit
options.description: Wait for emulator process to exit
